macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin-led selloff hits major crypto assets
items.summary: Bitcoin slipped below the key $70,000 level and the broader crypto market fell about 4%, dragging Ethereum down 3.77%, Uniswap down 4.5%, Cardano down 3.12%, and Stellar down 3.22%. CoinMarketCap also reported about a $110 billion drop in total crypto market capitalization tied to the selloff and ETF outflows.

items.title: Altcoin rotation lifts Internet Computer, Zcash, and NEAR
items.summary: Despite the market weakness, Internet Computer rose 8.7% on AI-infrastructure interest and ecosystem updates, Zcash jumped 14% after an Orchard pool bug fix and technical breakout, and NEAR rallied as high as 20% on stronger relative performance. The moves suggest capital rotation into select altcoins during the broader downturn.

items.title: Ethena surges after Coinbase partnership and investment
items.summary: Ethena (ENA) gained 9.2% in an hour after Coinbase announced a strategic partnership and its venture arm disclosed a $1 million open-market investment. The move was one of the clearest project-specific catalysts in the last 24 hours.

items.title: Hyperliquid token rises on ETF demand and regulatory tailwinds
items.summary: Hyperliquid’s HYPE token advanced about 3% as traders responded to ETF inflows and favorable regulatory sentiment. CoinMarketCap framed the move as part of a broader shift toward projects benefiting from institutionally oriented narratives.

items.title: Pi Network update and token unlock pressure weigh on price
items.summary: Pi (PI) moved 3.79% amid the v19.9 network upgrade, a 14.7 million token unlock, and the broader risk-off tone in crypto markets. The combination of supply pressure and weak sentiment was cited as the main driver.

items.title: Ripple expands Washington presence to shape U.S. crypto policy
items.summary: Ripple expanded its Washington, D.C. office to deepen engagement with U.S. regulators and policymakers on digital asset rules. The move comes as market structure, stablecoin oversight, and payments regulation remain active policy debates.

items.title: Telegram-linked TON rebrand discussed amid leadership changes
items.summary: A crypto market commentary referenced Pavel Durov taking control of the Telegram Foundation and renaming the TON token to Gram. This appears to be a notable project-development narrative, though the source is a video commentary rather than a primary project announcement.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: NVIDIA and Microsoft unveil new tools for personal AI agents on Windows PCs
items.summary: NVIDIA says it and Microsoft introduced new Windows-focused tools for building personal AI agents, including turnkey agent sandboxing, faster agentic inference, and broader multi-GPU support. The announcement also highlights NVIDIA’s RTX Spark family and new agent models from H Company and Nous Research.

items.title: ArXiv posts fresh machine learning papers, including work on adaptive inference and synthetic network generation
items.summary: The latest arXiv machine-learning listing includes new submissions such as resource-constrained adaptive inference for sequential pricing, efficient synthetic network generation via latent embedding reconstruction, and other recent ML research papers. This reflects continued activity in optimization, applied ML, and theory-heavy research.

items.title: ITU spotlights finalists in its AI for Good machine-learning-in-5G challenge
items.summary: ITU featured this year’s finalists in its AI for Good Machine Learning in 5G Challenge, highlighting practical ML applications aimed at telecommunications. The piece emphasizes the competition’s focus on real-world deployment, experimentation, and innovation.

items.title: Daily Nous discusses AI’s impact on the philosophy job market
items.summary: Daily Nous published a guest post examining how AI is affecting the philosophy job market. While not a product announcement, it reflects a broader trend of AI’s growing influence on academic labor markets and humanities-focused AI debate.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Maverick Games unveils debut open-world racer "Clutch"
items.summary: Maverick Games revealed its first title, "Clutch," a cinematic open-world driving game coming to PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC in spring 2027. The studio says more story and world details will be shown at Summer Game Fest on June 5.

items.title: PlayStation showcase reportedly highlighted multiple game announcements
items.summary: A livestream reaction recap referenced several PlayStation-related reveals, including "Dune: Awakening" coming to PS5 on September 22, a remaster of "Dynasty Warriors 3," "No Rest for the Wicked" launching on PS5 in October, and Bungie's "Marathon" getting an open trial period and discount tied to Season 2. The source is a YouTube reaction video, so the details should be treated as less authoritative than official publisher announcements.

items.title: More PlayStation reveal chatter includes classic game re-releases and new dates
items.summary: Another stream recap repeated several of the same PlayStation-era announcements, including a "Dynasty Warriors 3" remaster for PS5, "No Rest for the Wicked" on PS5 in October, and "Onimusha: Dawn of Dreams" joining the classic catalog later this year in August. It also mentioned "Marvel's Wolverine" with a September 15, 2026 launch, but that claim appears in a reaction stream rather than a primary announcement and should be verified elsewhere.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
